title: ADMLOGON
text: ADMLOGON Logon as a privileged administrative user of the Uniface Router. operation ADMLOGON params string User : IN ; (C40) string Password : IN ; (C40) endparams Parameters User —user account under which the Uniface Router runs, as specified by the $PRIV_MON_USER assignment setting; if it is not specified, the default account is assumed to be urouter ; For more information, see $PRIV_MON_USER . Password —password for the user name. Return Values If successful, $status is set to 0. Otherwise, see Return Codes . Use Allowed in all Uniface component types. Description The ADMLOGON operation is used to log on as privileged administrative user of the Uniface Router. If successful, privileged operations are allowed, such as starting and stopping Uniface Routers and Uniface Servers. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
